name: Recycle Bin Configuration
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: Recycle Bin per-drive configuration — NukeOnDelete (bypass Recycle Bin), MaxCapacity, and per-SID subkeys for multi-user configuration.
forensic_value: NukeOnDelete=1 means files are permanently deleted without going to the Recycle Bin — an anti-forensic setting. Check this per-user via NTUSER.DAT to distinguish user policy from system-wide config.
